command: env PYTHONPATH=outputs/code python outputs/code/scripts/write_benchmark_deep_metrics.py --corpus heat-shock-benchmark --baseline-dir outputs/results/heat-shock-benchmark/baselines --harmonized data/deg/harmonized/heat-shock-benchmark_harmonized.csv --gold data/studies/gold/heat_shock_hsf1_gold_panel.csv --gold-gene-column gene_symbol --piper-score-csv outputs/results/heat-shock-benchmark/piper_gene_scores.csv --output-dir outputs/results/heat-shock-benchmark/deep-metrics --title 'Heat shock deep benchmark metrics' --min-studies 2 --max-k 1000 --n-bootstrap 10 --bootstrap-methods piper_quality_weighted_score weighted_stouffer fisher --seed 1729
